phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Jardim da Condessa is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Jardim da Condessa?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW zhuh-ruh-DEEN DUH koong-DEH-suh?
phrases.cultural_note: The garden is a historic terrace area, typically accessed via the inner courtyard steps.

likely_response.local: Pergunte a um guia do parque ou na bilheteira.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG GEEUH DOO PAH-ruh-kih OHW NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask a park guide or at the ticket office.

responses.english: Ask a park guide or at the ticket office.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG GEEUH DOO PAH-ruh-kih OHW NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
responses.local: Pergunte a um guia do parque ou na bilheteira.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Sala dos Cisnes?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SAH-luh DOOSH SEEZH-nihsh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Sala dos Cisnes. Se precisar de ajuda, um guia do parque pode orientá-lo.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh DOOSH SEEZH-nihsh. SIH prih-see-ZAHR DIH uh-ZHOO-duh, OONNG GEEUH DOO PAH-ruh-kih PAW-dih aw-reeayng-TAH-LOO.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Swan Room. If you need help, a park guide can direct you.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Swan Room. If you need help, a park guide can direct you.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh DOOSH SEEZH-nihsh. SIH prih-see-ZAHR DIH uh-ZHOO-duh, OONNG GEEUH DOO PAH-ruh-kih PAW-dih aw-reeayng-TAH-LOO.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Sala dos Cisnes. Se precisar de ajuda, um guia do parque pode orientá-lo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Capela Real is
phrases.text_local: Onde se localiza a Capela Real?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH loo-kuh-LEE-zuh AH kuh-PEH-luh REEAHL?
phrases.cultural_note: The royal chapel is a key stop on the standard visitor route through the palace.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, siga os sinais da capela.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh OOSH see-NEYESH DUH kuh-PEH-luh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, follow the chapel signs.

responses.english: Good morning, follow the chapel signs.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh OOSH see-NEYESH DUH kuh-PEH-luh.
responses.local: Bom dia, siga os sinais da capela.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to reach the Capela Real
phrases.cultural_note: Visitors typically navigate the palace layout using colored floor markers and clear directional signage.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Capela Real.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH kuh-PEH-luh REEAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Capela Real.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Capela Real.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH kuh-PEH-luh REEAHL.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Capela Real.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Jardim da Condessa is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Jardim da Condessa?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW zhuh-ruh-DEEN DUH koong-DEH-suh?
phrases.cultural_note: Jardim da Condessa is a formal garden area within the Pena Palace grounds, often quieter than the main terraces.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o jardim.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW zhuh-ruh-DEEN.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the garden.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the garden.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW zhuh-ruh-DEEN.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o jardim.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Terraço da Rainha is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Terraço da Rainha?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW teh-RAH-soo DUH RUHEE-nyuh?
phrases.cultural_note: The queen's terrace offers panoramic views and is located in the historic south section.

likely_response.local: Pergunte a um guia do parque.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG GEEUH DOO PAH-ruh-kih.

responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG GEEUH DOO PAH-ruh-kih.
responses.local: Pergunte a um guia do parque.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar a Sala dos Cisnes?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AH SAH-luh DOOSH SEEZH-nihsh?

likely_response.local: Dirija-se à bilheteira ou a um guia do parque para obter indicações precisas.
likely_response.pronunciation: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh OHW AH OONNG GEEUH DOO PAH-ruh-kih PUH-ruh awb-TEHR een-dee-kuh-SOHNYSH prih-SEE-zuhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Go to the ticket office or a park guide for precise directions.

responses.english: Go to the ticket office or a park guide for precise directions.
responses.phonetic: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh OHW AH OONNG GEEUH DOO PAH-ruh-kih PUH-ruh awb-TEHR een-dee-kuh-SOHNYSH prih-SEE-zuhsh.
responses.local: Dirija-se à bilheteira ou a um guia do parque para obter indicações precisas.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Terraço da Rainha is
phrases.text_local: Desculpe, onde fica o Terraço da Rainha?
phrases.pronunciation: dihsh-KOOW-pih, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW teh-RAH-soo DUH RUHEE-nyuh?
phrases.cultural_note: The Terraço da Rainha offers panoramic views of Sintra. Use directional cues like 'sul' (south) as the palace has clear orientation.

likely_response.local: Ao sul do palácio, pelo corredor.
likely_response.pronunciation: OW SOOW DOO puh-LAHS-yoo, PEH-loo koo-rih-DOHR.
likely_response.translation_en: South of the palace, down the corridor.

responses.english: South of the palace, down the corridor.
responses.phonetic: OW SOOW DOO puh-LAHS-yoo, PEH-loo koo-rih-DOHR.
responses.local: Ao sul do palácio, pelo corredor.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar a Torre do Relógio?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AH TAW-rih DOO reh-LAWZH-yoo?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Torre do Relógio.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH TAW-rih DOO reh-LAWZH-yoo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Clock Tower.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Clock Tower.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH TAW-rih DOO reh-LAWZH-yoo.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Torre do Relógio.
